x_text:

Upload a selfie. AI generates what you could look like in 6 months.

Not a filter. Not fantasy. Your actual best-case transformation based on your goals, nutrition, and commitment.

Coming to Departure.
ig_text:
This isn't a filter. It's a target.

Upload a selfie. Set your goals. Our AI generates what you could realistically look like if you follow through.

Your future self is waiting.

x_text:
Most "gamified fitness apps" don't even track real workouts.

Departure tracks:
- 88+ exercises
- Sets, reps, weight
- Auto-detected PRs (Epley 1RM)
- 9 training methods
- Full calendar

And yes, you still earn XP and fight monsters.
ig_text:
A real workout tracker. Not "do 50 pushups."

88+ exercises across 10 categories. Sets, reps, weight. Personal records auto-detected. Training calendar that actually works.

9 training methods: PPL, Upper/Lower, Full Body, Bro Split, HIIT, CrossFit, and more.

Oh, and you earn XP for all of it.

#workouttracker #gymapp #fitnesstracker #personalrecords #gymmotivation #departure

x_text:
"My team just killed the Kraken."

Your team. Your journey. Your monsters.

x_text:
No, you can't bench 800 lbs in this app.

Departure has a built-in anti-cheat system:
- Category weight limits
- Volume spike detection
- 3 workout/day cap
- 130% personal best check

Earn it or don't claim it.
ig_text:
We built an anti-cheat system. For a fitness app.

Category weight limits. Volume spike detection. 3 workout/day cap. 130% personal best threshold.

Because if you're logging 800 lb bench presses, you're not training — you're lying.

Departure rewards real effort. Period.

#anticheat #fairplay #fitnessrpg #departure #honestgains #gymintegrity #naturalfitness
